string.text: 30-round Polymer magazine. Standard issue with the AK-12.
20-round aftermarket polymer magazine. It's shorter length makes reloading easier than with standard sized mags. Easily fits into small pouches.
30-round bakelite 7.62x39 magazine. Magazines like these are quite old but still function relatively well.
Bakelite 40-round RPK Magazine. This is also compatible with the AKM and other 7.62x39 AK rifles.
20-round polymer 7.62x39 magazine. fits in smaller magazine puches with ease.
30-round polymer 7.62x39 magazine molded in black colored plastic.
30-round polymer 7.62x39 magazine molded in flat dark earth colored plastic.
30-round bakelite 7.62x39 magazine. Magazines like these are quite old but still function relatively well.
73-round polymer 7.62x39 drum magazine. This magazine has a higher chance of jamming due to the nature of drum magazines.
75-round steel 7.62x39 magazine. This magazine has a higher chance of jamming due to the nature of drum magazines.
A 30-round 5.56x45 "Waffle Pattern" magazine for the SLR-106 civilian AK-based rifles.
A 45-round 5.56x45 extended magazine for the AK-101.
